name: Sonria Dentista
tagline: Healthy smiles for the whole family

hero.title: Your community dentist for the whole family
hero.subtitle: Personalized, convenient, and affordable dental care in Arlington, Commerce, Paris, and Grand Prairie. English and Spanish spoken here.
hero.imageAlt: Family smiling at the dental office

services.heading: The right approach for every smile
services.subheading: From checkups and cleanings to implants, orthodontics, extractions, dentures, and more, every member of your family is welcome here.

list.name: Preventive dentistry
list.blurb: Dental checkups, teeth cleanings, and proactive care to keep natural teeth healthy.
list.longBlurb: Preventive dentistry is the foundation of a lifetime of healthy smiles. Sonria focuses on proactive care that helps patients of all ages keep their natural teeth strong, beautiful, and functional.
list.whatIsIt: Preventive dentistry includes routine dental checkups, professional teeth cleanings, digital X-rays when needed, hygiene coaching, and early detection of cavities or gum problems.

fourSteps.title: Checkup
fourSteps.body: We review your teeth, gums, bite, and concerns so small issues can be caught early.

fourSteps.title: Cleaning
fourSteps.body: We remove buildup, polish your teeth, and help you maintain healthy habits at home.

fourSteps.title: Clear guidance
fourSteps.body: We explain what we see in plain English or Spanish and answer questions before treatment.

fourSteps.title: Ongoing care
fourSteps.body: We help you stay on schedule with regular visits and prevention-focused recommendations.

benefits: Helps prevent cavities and gum disease
Keeps dental problems from becoming more expensive
Good for children, adults, and seniors
list.whyChoose: Sonria is built for families who want friendly, bilingual care and practical guidance without pressure.

faqs.q: How often should I schedule a cleaning?
faqs.a: Most patients benefit from a checkup and cleaning every 6 months, though some may need a different schedule.
Yes. Sonria welcomes children and families across all four locations.
Yes. The team can help answer coverage questions before your visit.

list.name: Children's dentistry
list.blurb: Friendly dental care that helps children build healthy habits early.
list.longBlurb: Children's dentistry gives kids a positive start with dental care. Sonria welcomes families and helps children feel comfortable during checkups, cleanings, and routine visits.
list.whatIsIt: Children's dentistry includes exams, cleanings, prevention, education, and gentle care for young patients.

fourSteps.title: Warm welcome
fourSteps.body: We help children feel comfortable before the exam begins.

fourSteps.title: Gentle exam
fourSteps.body: We check teeth and gums while explaining each step in a calm way.

fourSteps.title: Cleaning and prevention
fourSteps.body: We clean the teeth and share age-appropriate hygiene guidance.

fourSteps.title: Family plan
fourSteps.body: Parents leave with clear next steps and answers to their questions.

benefits: Convenient for families with multiple children
list.whyChoose: The Sonria team is bilingual, family-friendly, and focused on making dental visits easier for parents and children.

faqs.a: Call the office and the team will help coordinate appointment options for your family.

faqs.q: Do you speak Spanish with children and parents?
faqs.a: Yes. Sonria has a bilingual English and Spanish dental team.

list.name: Restorative dentistry
list.blurb: Care for damaged teeth, including fillings, crowns, and smile repair.
list.longBlurb: Restorative dentistry brings strength, health, and beauty back to damaged teeth with precise, patient-focused care.
list.whatIsIt: Restorative dentistry can include fillings, crowns, treatment planning, and other care that repairs teeth after damage, decay, or wear.

fourSteps.title: Diagnosis
fourSteps.body: We identify the cause of discomfort, damage, or tooth breakdown.

fourSteps.title: Options
fourSteps.body: We explain the treatment choices, timing, and expected costs before moving forward.

fourSteps.title: Treatment
fourSteps.body: We restore the tooth with the recommended care plan.

fourSteps.title: Follow-up
fourSteps.body: We help you protect the restored tooth and maintain your smile.

list.whyChoose: Sonria focuses on clear communication, affordability, and bilingual support throughout treatment.

faqs.q: Will you explain the cost first?
faqs.a: Yes. Sonria emphasizes clear treatment options and payment guidance before care begins.
Third-party financing options are available to help patients start treatment with confidence.

list.seoTitle: Restorative Dentist in North Texas | Sonria Dentista
list.seoDescription: Restorative dental care for damaged teeth, crowns, fillings, and smile repair in Arlington, Commerce, Paris, and Grand Prairie.

list.name: Replace missing teeth
list.blurb: Options to restore confidence, speech, chewing, and smile function.
list.longBlurb: Missing teeth can affect health, speech, confidence, and daily comfort. Sonria offers modern tooth replacement options designed to look and feel natural.
list.whatIsIt: Missing teeth replacement may include dentures, partials, dental implants, snap-on dentures, or a personalized combination of treatments.

fourSteps.title: Consultation
fourSteps.body: We learn what is missing, what bothers you most, and what outcome you want.

fourSteps.title: Treatment options
fourSteps.body: We explain removable and implant-supported options in clear language.

fourSteps.title: Care plan
fourSteps.body: We build a plan around health, budget, comfort, and timeline.

fourSteps.title: Smile restoration
fourSteps.body: We help restore chewing, speaking, and confidence.

list.whyChoose: Sonria specializes in helping patients replace missing teeth with practical, affordable, and personalized solutions.

faqs.q: What are my options for missing teeth?
faqs.a: Depending on your needs, options may include dentures, partials, dental implants, or snap-on dentures.
Yes. Third-party financing is available for qualifying patients.

list.name: Cosmetic dentistry
list.blurb: Smile-focused care designed to improve confidence and appearance.
list.longBlurb: Cosmetic dentistry combines art and science to help patients feel more confident in their smiles.
list.whatIsIt: Cosmetic dental care may include smile improvements, whitening, veneers, bonding, or other treatments based on the patient's goals.

fourSteps.title: Smile goals
fourSteps.body: We discuss what you want to improve and what matters most to you.

fourSteps.title: Evaluation
fourSteps.body: We review tooth health, bite, color, and appearance.

fourSteps.title: Options
fourSteps.body: We explain treatment options that fit your smile and budget.

fourSteps.title: Results
fourSteps.body: We complete care with a natural-looking outcome in mind.

benefits: Can address stains, chips, gaps, or uneven teeth
Can be combined with restorative care
list.whyChoose: Sonria provides cosmetic care with a comfortable, bilingual, patient-first approach.

faqs.a: Yes. The goal is to improve your smile while keeping the result balanced and natural-looking.

list.blurb: Comfort-focused options for patients who feel nervous about dental care.

fourSteps.body: We listen to what makes dental care stressful for you.

fourSteps.title: Review health history

list.name: Clear braces
list.blurb: A more discreet way to straighten teeth with transparent aligner-style care.
list.longBlurb: Clear braces offer an aesthetic approach to straightening teeth without the look of traditional metal brackets.
list.whatIsIt: Clear braces or aligner-style treatment can help improve tooth alignment and bite appearance for qualifying patients.

fourSteps.title: Consultation
fourSteps.body: We check your teeth, bite, and smile goals.

fourSteps.title: Plan
fourSteps.body: We explain whether clear braces or another orthodontic option is appropriate.

fourSteps.title: Treatment
fourSteps.body: You follow the treatment plan and return for progress checks.

fourSteps.title: Retention
fourSteps.body: After treatment, retention helps keep teeth from shifting back.

benefits: Good option for many teens and adults

list.name: Dental implants
list.blurb: Permanent, natural-looking replacement options for missing teeth.
list.longBlurb: Dental implants help patients regain smile function and appearance with a secure tooth replacement option.
list.whatIsIt: A dental implant is a tooth replacement option designed to restore missing tooth function and support a natural-looking smile.

fourSteps.title: Evaluation
fourSteps.body: We evaluate your mouth, bone support, health, and goals.

fourSteps.title: Planning
fourSteps.body: We explain whether implants are appropriate and what the process involves.

fourSteps.title: Treatment
fourSteps.body: Implant care is completed according to your personalized plan.

fourSteps.title: Restoration
fourSteps.body: The final result is designed for function, comfort, and appearance.

benefits: Can replace one or more missing teeth
Designed to look and feel natural
Can be paired with denture solutions
list.whyChoose: Sonria highlights dental implants as a key missing-teeth solution and helps patients understand options clearly.

faqs.q: Am I a candidate for implants?
faqs.a: A consultation is needed to evaluate your health, bone support, and treatment goals.
Yes. Some denture options can attach to dental implants for better stability.

list.name: Snap-on dentures
list.blurb: A more secure alternative to traditional dentures using dental implants for stability.
list.longBlurb: Snap-on dentures can provide better stability than traditional dentures by attaching to dental implants.
list.whatIsIt: Snap-on dentures are implant-supported dentures that are designed to feel more secure than removable traditional dentures.

faqs.a: They are designed to attach securely to implants while still being removable as directed by the dentist.

faqs.a: Yes. Snap-on dentures use dental implants for support.

doctor.name: Sonria Dental Team
doctor.title: Bilingual family dental care
bio: At Sonria Dentista, patients are welcomed by an experienced dental team focused on comfortable, high-quality care for the whole family.
The team is fluent in English and Spanish and provides checkups, cleanings, emergency treatment, tooth replacement, orthodontics, and more across four North Texas locations.

about.heading: A true dental home
about.intro: Sonria Dentista provides personalized, convenient, and affordable dental care for the whole family.
story: Sonria Dentista is built around a simple promise: make dental care welcoming, practical, and easier for families to access.
The team provides dental checkups and teeth cleanings for patients of all ages, along with dental implants, orthodontics, extractions, dentures, and emergency treatment.
With four locations and a bilingual English and Spanish team, Sonria helps patients feel understood from the first call through the final visit.

values.title: Team of dental experts
values.body: Patients can trust they are in good hands thanks to broad experience and training across dental disciplines.

values.title: One-stop convenience
values.body: Checkups, cleanings, implants, orthodontics, extractions, and tooth replacement services are available through Sonria.

values.title: Consistent affordability
values.body: Dental insurance, Medicaid, Medicare, and third-party financing are part of the current affordability message.

values.title: Bilingual dental team
values.body: The team is fluent in English and Spanish so patients can receive care in the language that suits them best.

newPatients.heading: Your first visit
newPatients.intro: You're in the right place. Here's exactly what to expect so you arrive at ease.

specialOffer.label: New patient special
specialOffer.note: Comprehensive exam + digital X-rays + personalized consultation. No surprises.

steps.title: Book in 3 minutes
steps.body: Call your preferred office, use the appointment link, or complete the new patient intake form for your location.

steps.title: Arrive 10 min early
steps.body: Bring your ID, insurance (if any), and completed forms.

steps.title: Comprehensive exam
steps.body: We take digital X-rays, do a full oral exam, and discuss your history.

steps.title: Clear plan
steps.body: We explain what you need, when, and how much it costs. You decide.

whatToBring: Dental insurance card (if you have one)
newPatients.financing: We accept cash, cards, CareCredit, and in-house no-interest plans up to 12 months. We discuss payments without pressure.

insurance.heading: Insurance and financing
insurance.intro: The current Sonria site highlights dental insurance, Medicare, Medicaid, flexible payment options, and third-party financing to make dental care more affordable.
insurance.noInsurance: If you have questions about coverage or payment, the Sonria team can help you understand options before treatment begins.

financing.name: Dental insurance
financing.body: The team can answer coverage questions and work with your provider to help maximize benefits.

financing.name: Flexible payment options
financing.body: Convenient payment solutions help patients begin treatment with confidence.

financing.name: 3rd-party financing
financing.body: Financing partners may allow patients to space out dental costs with little to no interest.
